artPrompt: The violent instant of a damage roll: a six-sided die tumbling glowing ember-hot through the air above a feral town square, trailing sparks toward an unseen target, a goblin's clawed hand flung open mid-throw. A single bonfire blast lights the spinning die and the grim grin behind it, the rioting square dissolving into night-black smoke. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Roll the Bones
text: Roll a six-sided die. Roll the Bones deals damage to any target equal to the result.
